chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A permit issued under this subchapter must include:
the signature of the director of the port authority;

a statement of the kind of cargo being transported under the permit, the maximum weight and dimensions of the equipment, and the kind and weight of each commodity to be transported provided the gross weight of such equipment and commodities shall not exceed 125,000 pounds;
a statement of any condition on which the permit is issued;
a statement of the route designated under Section 623.219 (Route Designation) ;
the name of the driver of the vehicle in which the cargo is to be transported; and
the location where the cargo was loaded.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A port authority shall report to the Texas Department of Transportation all permits issued under this subchapter.

history.raw: Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 91, eff. September 1, 2011.
